doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The document accurately summarizes established EEOC legal interpretations, but the specific formatting and titling as "Section 8" of an "EEOC Compliance Manual" dated February 2018 is not an official publication of that agency.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 85
REASON: While the document accurately reflects ADEA legal principles, the EEOC Compliance Manual is structured into numbered sections that do not correspond to an "Age Discrimination" section titled "Section 8" published in 2018.
